notes: GitHub is an event source plus manual helper surface only.
GitHub-hosted heavy test matrices are disabled.
Branch protection should rely on Zetherion external statuses instead of GitHub workflow names.
Deploy promotion is healthy only when the Zetherion release verification receipt is green.

AGENTS.md: GitHub Actions is manual helper only

docs/development/canonical-test-gate-and: All heavy validation runs locally or on the Windows worker.
